title: Lab 11: Time Synchronization
description: Configure clientvm to synchronize time from servervm

tasks: Configure chrony on clientvm so it synchronizes only with servervm and starts automatically at boot.
hints: Remove any other server or pool lines.
Use iburst on the server line.
checks: awk '$1 ~ /^(server|pool)$/ { if ($2 != "servervm") bad=1; if ($1=="server" && $2=="servervm") good=1 } END { exit !(good && !bad) }' /etc/chrony.conf
systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active
task_titles: Configure chrony on clientvm so it synchronizes...
solution_commands: # remove any other server or pool lines
